zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Walwyn於1429年出生在英國賀福爾姆 馬可爾時，他的父親Thomas Walwyn24歲，母親Isabel Baskerville22歲。他和Agnes Milbourne至少有14個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1531年在他的家鄉享年102歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Walwyn于1429年出生在英国賀福爾姆 馬可爾时，他的父亲Thomas Walwyn24岁，母亲Isabel Baskerville22岁。他和Agnes Milbourne至少有14个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1531年在他的家乡享年102岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wal(d)wine, which is of ancient Germanic origin, from elements meaning ‘power’ + ‘friend’.

from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Walweyn, Walwain. The central French form of this name is Gawain (see Gavin ). This name is found in the medieval Arthurian romances and is traditionally explained as an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps meaning ‘hawk of the plain’.

variants.name: Gavin
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gábháin or Ó Gáibhín, both of which are derived from diminutives of gábhadh ‘want’ or ‘danger’ (the second being the more likely meaning here).

Scottish and northern English: from the personal name Gavin, Scottish form of English Gawain and French Gauvain . The name was introduced into English from French versions of the Arthurian romances, where this name was borne by one of the knights of the Round Table, brother of Galahad and Mordred and a nephew of Arthur. It has been taken to be an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps ‘hawk of the plain’.
Scottish: shortened form of McGavin , which is believed to be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gobhann ‘son of the smith’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Walwyn was born in 1429, in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, his father, Thomas Walwyn, was 24 and his mother, Isabel Baskerville, was 22. He had at least 14 sons and 4 daughters with Agnes Milbourne. He died in 1531, in his hometown, at the age of 102.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Walwyn est né en 1429, à Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Walwyn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel Baskerville, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 14 fils et 4 filles avec Agnes Milbourne. Il est décédé en 1531, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 102 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Walwyn 1429 in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Walwyn 24 und seine Mutter Isabel Baskerville 22. Er hatte mit Agnes Milbourne mindestens 14 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1531 im Alter von 102 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Walwyn è nato il nel 1429 nel Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Walwyn, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Baskerville, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 14 figli e 4 figlie con Agnes Milbourne. Morì nel 1531, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 102 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Walwynが1429年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアムチ マルクルで生まれた時，父Thomas Walwynは24歳，母Isabel Baskervilleは22歳であった。彼はAgnes Milbourneとの間に少なくとも14人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1531年に故郷で102歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Walwyn(이)가 1429년 영국 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Walwyn(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Baskerville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnes Milbourne(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 그의 고향에서 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Walwyn nasceu em 1429, em Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Walwyn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Baskerville, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 14 filhos e 4 filhas com Agnes Milbourne. Ele faleceu em 1531, em sua cidade natal, com 102 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Walwyn родился в 1429 г. в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Walwyn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Baskerville, 22. У него было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 4 дочери от Agnes Milbourne. Он умер в 1531 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 102 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Walwyn nació en 1429, en Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Walwyn, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel Baskerville, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 14 hijos y 4 hijas con Agnes Milbourne. Murió en 1531, en su pueblo, a la edad de 102 años.
